title: Genomic DNA Extraction Protocol Using DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit Optimized for Gram-Negative Bacteria
author: Pavlova A.S.
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.paadiae

steps.instruction: Add Ethanol to reagents of QIAGEN kit as described by vendor CSB solution (Cell suspension buffer) 1 M Tris-HCl (pH 8.0) - 10 ml 0.5 M EDTA (pH 8.0) - 20 ml Add deionized water to 1 Litre Store at +4°C to +8°C Prepare Proteinase K solution (20 mg/ml) in deionized water Store at -20°C Ethanol 96%
Streak an isolated colony from test cultures onto Trypticase Soy Agar ( TSA ) plates for confluent growth. Incubate aerobically at 37°C for 18-24 hours . Undetermined, incubation 24:00:00, incubation

24-hour culture is suspended in 2.2 ml CSB Buffer and measured the optical density by taking a value of D=7.0 ( 21х10 8 cells/ml ). Use a sterile polyester-fiber or cotton swab that has been moistened with sterile CSB to remove some of the growth from agar plate; suspend cells in CSB by spinning swab gently so cells will be evenly dispersed and formation of aerosols is minimized. We used a densitometer (Densi-La-Meter ® II, Erba Lachema, Czech Republic) for the measurement of bacterial suspension optical density, subsequently brought to a value of D=7.0 , which, according to McFarland standards, corresponds to 21х10 8 cells/ml. undetermined, CSB Buffer

Transfer 1 ml of bacterial cell suspension into a microcentrifuge tube and centrifuging for 10 min at 7 500 rpm . Carfully discard supernatant. undetermined, bacterial suspension 00:10:00, centrifugation
Add 180 µl Buffer ATL (QIAGEN) to the pellet and carefully resuspense it. undetermined, Buffer ATL Buffer ATL Qiagen Catalog #19076 You should use 1000 µl pipette tips to prevent cell injury.

Add 20 µl Proteinase K (QIAGEN) or 2 µl of self-prepared Proteinase K (20 mg/ml) (see 'Reagents section'). Mix thoroughly by vortexing, and incubate 1 hours at 56°C . undetermined, Proteinase K Proteinase K Amresco Catalog #0706-1G 01:00:00, incubation Undetermined, incubation It is crucial that Proteinase K should be freshly prepared or stored at -20 0 C before use.

Vortex for 15 s. Add 200 µl Buffer AL (QIAGEN) to the sample, and pipetting thoroughly up and down to yield homogeneous solution. undetermined, Buffer AL Buffer AL (lysis buffer) Qiagen A white gelatinous lysate may form on addition of Buffer AL and ethanol. This lysate can clog membrane pores when the mixture will be placed into the column. To avoid this effect pipette sample thoroughly up and down to yield homogeneous solution.
Pipet the mixture (including any precipitate) into the DNeasy Mini spin column (QIAGEN) placed in a 2 ml collection tube. Centrifuge at 8 000 rpm for 1 min . 00:01:00, centrifugation
Then add 200 µl ethanol 96% , and again thoroughly pipetting. Mix the sample by vortexing. undetermined, Ethanol 96% ethanol Contributed by users

Discard flow-through and collection tube. Place the DNeasy Mini spin column in a new collection tube. Add 500 µl Buffer AW1 to the column and centrifuge at 8 000 rpm for 1 min . undetermined, Buffer AW1 Buffer AW1 Qiagen Catalog #19081 00:01:00, centrifugation

Again discard flow-through and collection tube and place the DNeasy Mini spin column in a new collection tube. Add 500 µl Buffer AW2 to the column. Centrifuge at 14 000 rpm for 3 min . undetermined, Buffer AW2 Buffer AW2 Qiagen Catalog #19072 00:03:00, centrifugation

Place the DNeasy Mini spin column in a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and pipet 100 µl Buffer AE directly onto the DNeasy membrane. Incubate the sample at room temperature ( 23-25°С ) for 2-5 min, centrifuge at 8 000 rpm for 1 min to elute the DNA solution. The first elution should contain aproximately 80-90 µl DNA. undetermined, Buffer AE Buffer AE Qiagen Catalog #19077 00:05:00, incubation Undetermined, incubation 00:01:00, centrifugation

Place the DNeasy Mini spin column in another clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and again pipet 100 µl Buffer AE directly onto the DNeasy membrane. Incubate the sample at room temperature ( 23-25°С ) for 2-5 min and then centrifuge at 8 000 rpm for 1 min . The second elution contains 100-110 µl DNA. undetermined, Buffer AE Buffer AE Qiagen Catalog #19077 00:05:00, incubation Undetermined, incubation 00:01:00, centrfugation
